ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Havells India Limited has announced a Board Meeting on July 17, 2026, to consider and approve its Standalone and Consolidated Un-Audited Financial Results for the first quarter ended June 30, 2026. This standard regulatory disclosure also confirms the ongoing closure of the trading window for company shares until July 19, 2026, a routine measure to prevent insider trading ahead of the results announcement. The document indicates no immediate red flags, merely a procedural step towards quarterly financial reporting.
